ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Optional protocol name used to indicate the authorization protocol */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Required token type used to indicate the format of the token string */,
  "token" TEXT /* Required token used as a credential for authorization or access */,
  "description" TEXT /* Optional description for the credential */,
  "keys" TEXT /* Optional list of protocol-specific keys or assertions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the credential is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credentials_token_type FOREIGN KEY ("token_type") REFERENCES token_types ("token_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credentials_protocol FOREIGN KEY ("protocol") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_types" (
  "token_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token type */,
  "token_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the token type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the token type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credential_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential associated with the key */,
  "key_name" TEXT /* Name of the key */,
  "key_value" TEXT /* Value of the key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credential_keys_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the credential */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the credential was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_credentials" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was granted access to the credential */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's access to the credential was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third-party service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the third-party service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the third-party service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credential_serviceBindings" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-party service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential was bound to the third-party service */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credential's binding to the third-party service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id", "service_id")
)
